name: E48 Egg Incubator
description: The E48 Egg Incubator is an electrically heated machine that provides optimal conditions for the incubation and hatching of eggs.

taxonomy.sub_category: E48 Egg Incubator Updated on August 22, 2024 · Created on August 31, 2018 E48 Egg Incubator The E48 Egg Incubator is an electrically heated machine that provides optimal conditions for the incubation and hatching of eggs. Developed By Engoho Kuku Farmer Tested By Engoho Kuku Farmer Content Partners Unknown Info Tags Snapshot Manufacturing & Delivery Performance & Use Research & Standards Feedback Product Description The E48 Egg Incubator is an electrically heated machine that provides optimal conditions for the incubation and hatching of eggs. It is designed for use by small scale farmers, where they can incubate up to a capacity of 48 eggs. The E48 Egg Incubator works with a closed loop mechanism that allows the user to set humidity, temperature, egg turning and positioning values on a user interface. The closed loop mechanism then adjusts the conditions inside the incubator to the optimum parameters to facilitate the development of the eggs. Target SDGs SDG 2: Zero Hunger SDG 1: No Poverty Market Suggested Retail Price $200.00 Target Users (Target Impact Group) Small and Medium-sized Enterprises Distributors / Implementing Organizations Engokho Kuku Farmer , Ecochicks Poultry Limited Regions East Africa Countries Kenya Manufacturing/Building Method Batch production Interview with representative Intellectural Property Type Trademark User Provision Model Users can obtain the product directly from the manufacturing company; Wincom Limited or through online distributors such as Alibaba.com. The incubator can also be obtained from local distributors such as Engokho Kuku Farmer and Ecochicks Poultry Limited. Distributions to Date Status 10,000 sets per month Egg capacity 48 eggs Egg turning mode Automatic egg turning every 2 hours Temperature control mechanism Digital temperature control Size (l x w x h) 50cm x 47cm x 23.5cm Weight (kg) 5.5 Power source Dual power input: AC/DC (solar) power supply Power rating (W) 80 Voltage rating (V) 110V-120V at 60HZ or 220V-240V at 50HZ Control interface (Yes/No) Yes. It has an LED display control interface. Design Specifications Design specifications: Digital temperature control LED display showing temp, humidity and egg turning time. Temperature and humidity alarms 4 large observation windows to allow monitoring without having to open the incubator. Has an automatic turning system Has a temperature adjustment range between 30 o C to 42 o C The bottom of the unit has inbuilt water channels to allow easy control of humidity levels. Made from a durable and easy to clean material to prevent bacteria. Product Schematics Technical Support Technical support provided by Engokho Kuku Farmer Replacement Components Replacement components are available from Engokho Kuku Farmer. Interview with representative Lifecycle 8 years. Interview with representative Manufacturer Specified Performance Parameters Specified performance targets Easy to clean Suitable for incubating all poultry: chicken, duck, goose and turkey eggs. Simple to use with set-up and operation instructions provided. Vetted Performance Status Unknown Safety No specified safety precautions. Complementary Technical Systems Engokho Kuku farmer offers a wide range of chicken farming equipment to small scale farmers.
